items.title: Power outages hit France as it records hottest day since measurements began
items.summary: France has recorded it hottest day since records began in 1947, its national weather agency says, breaking a record set on Tuesday.

items.title: Air conditioning creates political divide after France records hottest day
items.summary: France is being forced to re-think its longstanding reservations about air-conditioning as temperatures soar.

items.title: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
items.summary: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 世衛：漢他病毒疫情若無新增病例　有望7/2宣告結束
items.summary: 世界衛生組織（WHO）今天宣布，在荷蘭籍郵輪「洪迪亞斯號」上爆發、掀起國際關注的致命漢他病毒（Hantavirus）疫情，應能在7月2日宣告結束。  法新社報導，「洪迪亞斯號」（MV Hon...…

items.title: 盧比歐盼IAEA盡快進伊朗　強調荷莫茲海峽不應收費
items.summary: 國際原子能總署（IAEA）表示，將依美伊協議，派員檢查伊朗核設施。美國國務卿盧比歐也說，IAEA人員應盡快獲准進入伊朗；他並強調，華府的立場是荷莫茲海峽應免費開放。  美伊日前簽署終戰備忘錄...…

items.title: 日本擬砸74兆元投資17個領域　押注AI與半導體
items.summary: 日本政府24日提出「官民投資路線圖」，計劃在截至2041年3月的近15年間，累計投入逾370兆日圓（約新台幣74兆元），重點投資人工智慧、半導體、造船等17個「戰略領域」。  「讀賣新聞」報...…
